Actors: Kiefer Sutherland, Mary Lynn Rajskub, Carlos Bernard
Plot: In this concept drama, each season takes place within one 24 hour period. Day 1: Jack Bauer is the head of field ops for an elite team of CTU agents who uncover an assassination plot targeting Presidential nominee David Palmer. Meanwhile, Jack's strained marriage to his wife, Teri, is pushed to the brink by the sudden disappearance of their troubled teenage daughter. What will the next 24 hours hold?
Language: English, Russian, German, Korean, Arabic, Spanish, Serbian, Mandarin
Awards: Won 20 Primetime Emmys. 74 wins & 208 nominations total
